_comment: MR014 Electrical Inspection & Test Plan Checklist — trial of expressing a real multi-stage paper form in the SDM. Each form stage is an activity gated by status via show_condition; the stage's attestation block advances status in the after hook. Each checklist question is a ROW-LEVEL composite attribute (sub-usages over the shared ok/ref/comment pool atoms), grouped under presentation-only section markers — so questions keep attribute-level show_conditions between them (redesign ruled 2026-07-18). Cells land nested in activity history and flatten to dotted keys (attr.sub) in rpt_attributes. Signature is a text attribute until a signature type exists.

recordType.name: Inspection Checklists
recordType.description: Electrical inspection and test plan checklist for a work area (MR014).

workflow.name: Inspection Checklist Workflows
workflow.description: Staged completion of the electrical inspection and test plan checklist: preliminaries → pre-start → carry out work → pre-handover → final sign-off, each stage closed by an attestation.

activities.name: Raise Checklist
activities.description: Open a checklist for a work area and capture its header (the form's identification block).

activities.name: Complete Preliminary Activities
activities.description: Verify the preliminary items (access, equipment, materials) and attest the stage. Initials are required per item with can_waive: a not-applicable item is waived with a reason instead of faking an initial.

attributes.description: Items/activities to be verified before work starts.
I have carried out all necessary inspections and verify that the above items/activities conform to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.validation_message: Attestation date cannot be in the future

activities.name: Complete Pre-Start
activities.description: Verify the pre-start items and attest the stage.

attributes.description: Items to be verified immediately before work starts.
I have carried out all necessary inspections and verify that the above items/activities conform to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.validation_message: Attestation date cannot be in the future

activities.name: Complete Carry Out Work
activities.description: Verify the carry-out-work items and attest the stage.

attributes.description: Items to be verified while the work is carried out.
I have carried out all necessary inspections and verify that the above items/activities conform to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.validation_message: Attestation date cannot be in the future

activities.name: Complete Pre-Handover
activities.description: Verify the pre-handover items (testing, power restoration, clean-up) and attest the stage.

attributes.description: Items to be verified before handover of the work area.
I have carried out all necessary inspections and verify that the above items/activities conform to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.validation_message: Attestation date cannot be in the future

activities.name: Final Sign-Off
activities.description: Attest that all work for this work area has been completed and conforms to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.description: I have carried out all necessary inspections and verify that the above work for this work area has been completed and conforms to the contract specification/documents.

attributes.validation_message: Attestation date cannot be in the future

after_hook: queue services.notify.user('Checklist ' + context.record.id + ' signed off for work area ' + context.record.work_area)
